name: Ghoti Chain
name_jp: ゴーティス・チェイン
desc: Banish 1 face-up Fish monster you control; Special Summon 1 of your "Ghoti" monsters that is banished, or in your hand, Deck, or GY, with a different original name from the monster banished to activate this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only activate 1 "Ghoti Chain" per turn.
eff: Banish 1 face-up Fish monster you control; Special Summon 1 of your "Ghoti" monsters that is banished, or in your hand, Deck, or GY, with a different original name from the monster banished to activate this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only activate 1 "Ghoti Chain" per turn.

summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
banished: Banishes cards when they leave the field
